title: PaperCard
description:
PaperCard Client(以下简称PCC)
PCC使用1.20.1Fabric端
PCC侧重于完整的客户端体验 拥有丰富的[花里胡哨]Mod支持 相对配置的需求较高
body:
[简体中文]      
PaperCard Client(以下简称PCC)和PaperCard Client Lite(以下简称PCCL)         
PCC及PCCL皆使用1.20.1Fabric端           
PCC侧重于完整的客户端体验 拥有丰富的[花里胡哨]Mod支持 相对配置的需求较高(V1.5.1版本后已优化)         
PCCL则更侧重于"原版"、"优化" 在删减了部分PCC[花里胡哨]Mod的同时对配置的需求进一步降低        
以下是PCC以及PCCL在测试机下的表现：        
原版 Fabric端 -300 FPS -/- RAM         
仅优化Mod -573 FPS 1G/2G RAM         
PCC Full -375 FPS 6G/12G RAM [-V1.5.1]     
PCC Full -375 FPS 6G/6G RAM [+V1.5.1]      
PCC Lite -420 FPS 2G/3G RAM     
PCC And PCCL 内存需求：最低分配6G(PCC)/3G(PCCL)     

[English]     
PaperCard Client (hereinafter referred to as PCC) and PaperCard Client Lite (hereinafter referred to as PCCL).    
Both PCC and PCCL use 1.20.1 Fabric.     
PCC focuses on a complete client experience with rich [fancy] mod support Relatively high configuration requirements (optimized after v1.5.1)    
PCCL is more focused on "original" and "optimized", with some of the PCC [fancy] mods removed, while the configuration requirements are further reduced.     
Below is the performance of PCC and PCCL under the test machine:     
Original Fabric side -300 FPS -/- RAM   
Optimized Mod only -573 FPS 1G/2G RAM    
PCC Full -375 FPS 6G/12G RAM [-V1.5.1]   
PCC Full -375 FPS 6G/6G RAM [+V1.5.1]    
PCC Lite -420 FPS 2G/3G RAM     
PCC And PCCL Memory Requirement: Minimum Allocation 6G(PCC)/3G(PCCL)
